events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from UCSF Medical Center for client 1048. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: renal. Allergies: none. Sodium ceiling 600 mg/meal, carbs 45–75 g/meal. Prefers Chinese; dislikes coconut milk. Cooking ability: full. 5 meals/week, zone Richmond.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Steamed Fish with Ginger and Rice
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'renal': meal lacks 'renal-friendly' tag.

events.title: Rejected: Buddha's Delight
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'renal': meal lacks 'renal-friendly' tag.

events.title: Matched: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 354/600 mg ✓, carbs 45 g (target 45–75) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Chicken Congee with Scallions
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 364/600 mg ✓, carbs 49 g (target 45–75) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Ginataang Gulay with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 401/600 mg ✓, carbs 51 g (target 45–75) ✓.

events.title: Pickup scheduled
events.detail: Meals for client 1048 ready for pickup 2026-07-21, window 12:00–14:00 (Richmond group). Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1048: 5 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
